clusters.justification: This cluster represents the broad functional axis of emotional reactivity, physiological arousal, and subjective mood states typically subserved by limbic and salience-processing neural circuitry.
This cluster captures the overarching cognitive domain of incentive processing, cost-benefit analysis, and goal-directed drive intrinsically supported by frontostriatal reward circuits.
This cluster delineates internally-directed abstract processing, binding self-referential representation with interpersonal understanding, which robustly maps onto default mode macro-architecture.
